# Architecture templates

Copy this folder into your application as `docs/architecture/` during Bootstrap (or copy subfolders as needed).

| Path | Extension |
|------|-----------|
| [context/](./context/) | 1 — Automatic base context |
| [prompts/](./prompts/) | 2 — Specialized agent roles |
| [work/_template-review.md](./work/_template-review.md) | 4 — Review reports |
| [ops/](./ops/) | 5 — Operational knowledge |

See [Blueprint Pattern Extensions](../blueprint-pattern-extensions.md) and [PROMPT.md](../../PROMPT.md).
